title: SIDEEFFECT warning false positives on coverage
body:
I haven't been able to narrow this down to a reproducer yet, but 
- this came up sometime between June and now
- the warnings only show up when building with coverage enabled with `--coverage-line --coverage-user`
- one is a package that reads environment, so not pure but also no sideffect
- the other should be a pure function, but does some concatentations, and is defined within a module
